notes: Fixes vmlx#80: chat_template.jinja not auto-loaded by HF AutoTokenizer. Two layers of defense — monkey-patch mlx_lm.tokenizer_utils.load at import time + _inject_chat_template_if_missing helper at every load_model_with_fallback return. Live-verified on user cases: gemma-4-26b (chat_template.jinja) and MiniMax-M2.7-JANGTQ (JANG path).
